productName: Legit Gold Infused Pre-roll Banana Cake - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Banana Cake and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of honey, butter, and diesel, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
